RUNESMITH2-BROKEN_RUBY.description: At the start of each combat, gain {Ignis:rs2Icon()} and [gold]Enhance[/gold] [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] at random.
RUNESMITH2-BROKEN_RUBY.title: Broken Ruby
RUNESMITH2-CORE_CRYSTAL.description: At the start of each combat, gain {Elements:rs2Icon()} and [gold]Enhance[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-CORE_CRYSTAL.title: Core Crystal
